verses.1: Oh that you were like my brother,
verses.2: I would lead you, bringing you into the house of my mother,
verses.3: His left hand would be under my head.
verses.4: I adjure you, daughters of Jerusalem,
verses.5: Who is this who comes up from the wilderness,
verses.6: Set me as a seal on your heart,
verses.10: I am a wall, and my breasts like towers,
verses.11: Solomon had a vineyard at Baal Hamon.
verses.12: My own vineyard is before me.
verses.13: You who dwell in the gardens, with friends in attendance,
